mnemonics: CIA for AI: Confidence through Compliance, Innovation, and Accountability
keyPoints: Establishing robust governance frameworks is essential for trustworthy AI innovation.
Continuous risk assessment and mitigation must be integrated throughout the AI lifecycle.
Transparency and stakeholder engagement build public trust and acceptance of AI systems.
commonMistakes: Focusing solely on technical performance while neglecting ethical and social implications.
Treating compliance as a one-time checklist rather than an ongoing process.
Underestimating the importance of clear communication about AI capabilities and limitations to the public.
